en_title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Split-Screen Co-Op on PS5 Requires PlayStation Plus for Both Players
cn_title: 《PlayStation》《光环：战役进化》分屏须双PS Plus
subtitle: 离谱！沙发也得双会员
opus_summary: 《光环：战役进化》PS5分屏合作要求两名玩家均需订阅PS Plus并绑定微软账号，此举令玩家大为不满，被批背离原作免费合作传统。相比之下Xbox和PC要求更宽松。游戏7月28日发售，将登陆全平台。

paragraphs.en: If you plan on hopping into Halo: Campaign Evolved split-screen co-op when it launches for PS5 next month, you'll need not just one but two accounts with PlayStation Plus subscriptions to play.
paragraphs.cn: 打算下个月在PS5上玩《光环：战役进化》分屏合作的玩家注意了：你需要的不是一份PlayStation Plus订阅，而是两份，两个账号都得有。

paragraphs.en: Halo Studios clarified the account requirements for the upcoming story remake with a Halo Waypoint Q&A yesterday. It serves as a deep dive into some of the hottest topics to emerge since the game was announced for PC and Xbox Series X | S – and PlayStation 5 – in October 2025, but not everyone is happy with what the team had to say.
paragraphs.cn: Halo Studios昨天通过Halo Waypoint问答环节澄清了这款剧情重制版的账号要求。本次问答深入探讨了自2025年10月游戏宣布登陆PC、Xbox Series和PS5以来最热门的一些话题，但并非所有人都对开发团队的说法感到满意。

paragraphs.en: The breakdown confirms what is needed to play with others, with each platform demanding different requirements. For example, you'll need at least a Microsoft account and Xbox Gamertag, regardless of whether you're a PC, Xbox, or PlayStation user, to enable cross-play and cross-platform progression. Halo: Campaign Evolved's requirements on PlayStation, specifically, however, are especially steep.
paragraphs.cn: 问答详细列出了与他人联机所需的条件，不同平台各有要求。例如，无论你用PC、Xbox还是PlayStation，都至少需要一个微软账号和Xbox Gamertag，才能启用跨平台联机和跨平台进度互通。但具体到PlayStation，《光环：战役进化》的要求格外苛刻。

paragraphs.en: "If you’re playing split-screen on PlayStation 5, both accounts will need to have PlayStation Plus and be linked to a Microsoft account," Halo Studios said. "Having these active PlayStation Plus subscriptions will also provide access to online co-op play."
paragraphs.cn: 「如果你在PS5上玩分屏，两个账号都需要有PlayStation Plus并绑定微软账号，」Halo Studios表示，「拥有这些有效的PlayStation Plus订阅后，也能在线合作游玩。」

paragraphs.en: Based on this explanation, when players sit down to play Halo: Campaign Evolved co-op in July, all participating users will need to have an active subscription, even if they're sitting right next to each other on the couch. PlayStation Plus is usually only required to access online multiplayer for premium gaming experiences, while free-to-play and offline titles can be enjoyed without a subscription.
paragraphs.cn: 按照这一说明，当玩家们在7月坐下来玩《光环：战役进化》合作模式时，所有参与者都需要持有有效的订阅，哪怕两人就并排坐在沙发上。通常，只有付费游戏的在线多人模式才需要PlayStation Plus，而免费游戏和离线作品无需订阅即可游玩。

paragraphs.en: For comparison, those on Xbox Series X | S looking to play split-screen will only need a unique Microsoft account, while players hoping to enjoy co-op online will need an active Xbox Game Pass subscription. Those playing on Steam will only need to link to a Microsoft account.
paragraphs.cn: 对比之下，Xbox Series玩家想玩分屏只需一个独立的微软账号，而想在线合作则需要有效的Xbox Game Pass订阅。Steam玩家则只需绑定微软账号即可。

paragraphs.en: Halo: Campaign Evolved will not be free-to-play, but the decision to lock even split-screen behind the Sony gaming service seems especially strange. Judging by reactions to the news online, many agree.
paragraphs.cn: 《光环：战役进化》并非免费游戏，但就连分屏都被锁在索尼会员服务后面的决定显得格外奇怪。从网上的反响来看，不少人都这么认为。

paragraphs.en: "Needing to buy online to play local split screen is some next level insanity," one X/Twitter user said .
paragraphs.cn: 「为了玩本地分屏还得买在线服务，真是疯了，离谱到新高度，」一位X/Twitter用户说道。

paragraphs.en: "Player 2 on your couch needs PS Plus and a Microsoft account," another added . "[Halo: Combat Evolved] 2001 is laughing."
paragraphs.cn: 「坐在你沙发上的2号玩家需要PS Plus和微软账号，」另一位用户补充道，「2001年的《光环：战斗进化》正在发笑。」

paragraphs.en: Halo: Campaign Evolved launched in 2001 and has remained one of the most beloved games in the Xbox catalog since. That's thanks, in part, to its co-op feature, which has allowed players to enjoy its story mode together – and at no extra charge – for decades.
paragraphs.cn: 《光环：战役进化》诞生于2001年，自那以后一直是Xbox游戏阵容里最受喜爱的作品之一。这一定程度上要归功于它的合作功能，几十年来玩家可以一起享受剧情模式，而且完全免费。

paragraphs.en: Halo: Campaign Evolved reimagines that classic sci-fi narrative for modern devices, and although co-op is back with newly added support for up to four players online, it sounds like those hoping to relive the glory days of one of the oldest couch co-op Xbox experiences will need to jump through more than a few hoops to make it happen on PS5. IGN has reached out to Sony for comment and additional clarification regarding PlayStation Plus requirements for the game.
paragraphs.cn: 《光环：战役进化》为现代设备重构了这个经典科幻叙事，虽然合作模式回归，并新增了最多支持四名玩家的在线合作，但那些想重温这款最老牌Xbox沙发合作体验光辉岁月的玩家，想在PS5上实现恐怕得费尽周折。IGN已联系索尼，就本作的PlayStation Plus要求寻求评论和进一步说明。

paragraphs.en: "Yeahhhhh this just went from a day-1 buy to a not-buy honestly," one Reddit user . "I was gonna play with my wife, but honestly have no interest in playing in my own. It's not worth paying for a whole nother subscription to do that. Kind of ridiculous."
paragraphs.cn: 「呃……这游戏我从首发必买直接变成不买了，说实话，」一位Reddit用户说道，「我本来打算和老婆一起玩，但老实说一个人玩我又没兴趣。为了这个再掏一份完整订阅真不值，有点荒谬。」

paragraphs.en: "You need to have an account linked to Microsoft AND pay for PS Plus just to play split-screen local co-op???" someone else added . "Since when did we reach this level of madness?!?!"
paragraphs.cn: 「就因为想玩本地分屏合作，就非得绑微软账号，还要买PS Plus？？？」另一个人补充道，「我们什么时候疯到这个地步了？！？！」

paragraphs.en: PlayStation Plus offers three tiers: Essential ($10.99/month), Extra ($16.99/month), and Premium ($19.99/month). Prices across the service were increased in May . Halo: Campaign Evolved has a release date of July 28, 2026, for PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X | S. For more, you can read IGN's final preview for the game.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation Plus提供三档：基础版10.99美元(约合人民币75元)/月，升级版16.99美元(约合人民币115元)/月，高级版19.99美元(约合人民币136元)/月。该服务价格曾于5月集体上调。《光环：战役进化》将于2026年7月28日登陆PC、PS5和Xbox Series。
